front_to_back_integration_criterion: N/A - self-referential plugin feature (a new stdlib engine + a new skill contract + markdown wiring + tests + docs). No runnable frontend, no backend service, no endpoint. Recorded authorizations: Playwright N/A (no runnable UI in this repo) and dev-API integration N/A (no endpoint touched); the claude_design MCP fetch is an injected adapter exercised offline via FakeClaudeDesignSource. The verification surface is TDD unit tests, the full pytest suite under both encodings, the instruction-compliance lint, openspec strict validation, and the Phase 3/7 review gates.

acceptance_criteria: detect_claude_design_offer returns detected:true with trigger_forms including design-url and project_id/file_selector parsed for a claude.ai/design/p/<id>?file=... URL; detected:true with mcp-mention for a claude_design mention alone; implement_target parsed from an 'Implement: <path>' line; detected:false with empty trigger_forms for no-offer prose. Covered by tests/test_claude_design_import.py.

entries.spec_requirement_id: claude-design-import/Native MCP fetch and whole-project materialization
scenarios: a fetched project materializes every file
acceptance_criteria: materialize_project writes every fetched file under dest_dir with content intact and records materialized_dir + files_written + focus; _safe_relpath rejects absolute paths and '..' traversal (nothing written outside dest_dir); the whole project is fetched (not only the ?file= file) with focus recorded. Covered by tests against FakeClaudeDesignSource.

entries.spec_requirement_id: claude-design-import/Materialized design flows into the existing front-end path
scenarios: design-fidelity-mapping lists the materialized dir as a source
acceptance_criteria: agents/oracle-deriver.md states a Claude Design link materialized by claude-design-import is walked as an interactive-mockup oracle; skills/design-fidelity-mapping/SKILL.md lists the materialized dir as a design-input source; no downstream derivation logic changed. Covered by structural tests / lint over the edited files.

unit: tests/test_claude_design_import.py or existing structural tests: wiring assertions

scenarios: unavailable MCP yields an instruct-then-fallback plan
acceptance_criteria: plan_when_unavailable returns action=instruct-then-fallback with an instruction naming connect-the-claude_design-MCP + run /design-login and fallback=zip-local when a local fallback is available (instruct-then-halt only when it is not); the skill documents proceeding down the zip/local path on decline. Covered by tests + the skill body.

scenarios: the local design-input path still works
acceptance_criteria: a run with a local design dir and no link -> detection returns not-detected and existing local discovery proceeds unchanged; skills/intake-and-mapping/SKILL.md documents Claude Design import as an ADDITIONAL source, not a replacement. Covered by a no-offer detection test + the edited intake skill body.

unit: tests/test_intake_and_mapping.py (if present) or lint: additive wiring

scenarios: detection and fetch are tested offline
acceptance_criteria: tests/test_claude_design_import.py runs fully offline (no network, FakeClaudeDesignSource); python -m pytest from the repo root is green under cp1252 and PYTHONUTF8=1 with the split explained by known environment-conditional tests + this change's new tests.

entries.spec_requirement_id: claude-design-import/New skill and design-consuming command-surface wiring
scenarios: the new skill is present and lint-clean
the design-consuming command subset carries the reference
acceptance_criteria: skills/claude-design-import/SKILL.md present, name==dir, description < 1024 with no ': '/' #' hazard, required sections incl. ## Cross-references; instruction-compliance lint reports zero findings over the in-scope set incl. the new/edited files; commands/architect-team.md + visual-to-api.md + ux-test.md reference the detection and bug-fix/mini do not. Covered by tests/test_instruction_compliance.py + tests/test_skills.py.

scenarios: the skill count is consistent everywhere
acceptance_criteria: plugin.json + marketplace.json say 3.33.0 and CHANGELOG top entry is [3.33.0]; CLAUDE.md, README, docs/CODEBASE_MAP.md, docs/INSTRUCTION_COMPLIANCE_RUBRIC.md all state 48 skills matching the real skills/*/ count; doc-currency audit overall:pass. Covered by the Phase 8 doc-updater + system-architect audit.
